programme.title: E24 - Lalique Museum/Olivier Polge/Pharrell Williams/Aurore Mazeres
programme.desc: In Wingen-sur-Moder, the Musee Lalique presents the abundant work of Rene Lalique and his successors. Olivier Polge is the perfumer for Chanel. For Vuitton, Pharrell Williams breaks down the boundaries between music, fashion and art. Aurore Mazeres carries on the skills of five generations of upholsterers who preceded her.

programme.title: E9 - Beacon Of The Pyrenees
programme.desc: The Pic du Midi scientific observatory has proudly dominated the Pyrenees, 2,877 metres above sea-level, for one hundred and forty years. Notably specialising in the study of the sun's corona, the site is today open to the public, offering a fabulous panorama and unique experience to all who visit.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: It is a dazzling and colorful world full of Arab adventures. It is the world of the sheikhs and the world of big business.

programme.title: E3 - Madagascar in Cold Blood
programme.desc: Explore the lives of Madagascar’s cold-blooded creatures. Chameleons, frog, lizards, and snakes have all adapted in order to survive on the island. We take a look at how they find food, reproduce, and avoid predators.

programme.title: E3 - A New Zealand Christmas
programme.desc: See how one animal family’s tragedy is another’s holiday dinner as New Zealand’s mainland and island creatures, including penguins, flightless birds, sea lions, and sharks, battle to feed and protect their young in this marine environment.

programme.title: Osprey: Sea Raptor
programme.desc: Wade into a saltwater marsh along the Connecticut River to witness the heartwarming reunion of two ospreys who’ve been mates for a decade. Witness their highs and lows over a single summer as they raise their chicks and dodge a host of predators.

programme.title: E2 - In Flight Meals
programme.desc: Go hunting with flyers who excel at making mid-air catches. Watch the metamorphosis of the acrobatic emperor dragonfly, admire the barn owl’s stealthy approach to prey, and catch a wandering salamander’s death-defying leap into the abyss.

programme.title: E4 - Flight Path
programme.desc: Plot a course for adventure as animals go on remarkable journeys through the skies. Navigate a wooden labyrinth with a speedy goshawk, join a sandgrouse’s trek to a distant watering hole, and see a murmuration of starlings mesmerize their nemesis.

programme.title: E2 - North America
programme.desc: Experience the powerful, colourful phenomena that swirl across the heavens in North America. Watch polar bears search for food under the aurora borealis, map the frigid path of a polar vortex, and elude violent tornadoes with a prairie dog family.

programme.title: E3 - Into the Fire
programme.desc: Bask in the largest intact savannah on the planet, where mammals and insects fly through the air with the greatest of ease. Study traditional wildfire-management methods, explore a sandstone refuge, and watch a sugar glider try to escape the flames.

programme.title: After the Wildfires
programme.desc: Examine fire’s pivotal role in shaping Australia’s natural world. Tour the devastation left by 2020’s brutal bush-fire season, learn how climate change fuelled this watershed event, and chart the long-term recovery of the continent’s wildlife.

programme.title: E1 - Body Language
programme.desc: Join researchers as they study how animals communicate. Find out how wolves use their body language to unite the pack and maintain a sophisticated social structure, and see the astounding number of gestures chimps use to communicate.

programme.title: E6 - Heir to the Clan
programme.desc: Spotty, a female hyena cub, is destined to be leader of the Chimbwe clan that lives in the heart of Zambia’s Luangwa Valley. But she has yet to prove herself. Witness her fight to find her place in this savagely competitive family.

programme.title: E5 - Cat Country
programme.desc: Join a group of wildlife scientists tracking the comeback of the ocelot in the Pantanal. Check in on their network of trail cameras, which capture the movements of this elusive spotted cat, and see the perils it faces, including giant anacondas.

programme.title: E16 - Pow Tao
programme.desc: Tao asks Mojo and Bo to help him film an action-packed snowboarding video, but Mojo is not so steady on the slopes. Which top can they swap to grab the white-hot snow shots?

programme.title: E15 - The Pizza Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels help Duggee try out his new outdoor pizza oven. Duggee makes the bases, then the Squirrels each put on all the toppings they like best. Some of their combinations are... interesting!

programme.title: E17 - The Camping Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are going camping and they hear a scary noise outside the tent!

programme.title: E19 - Mysterious Milkshake
programme.desc: More fun with Duggee, biscuits, eggs, toys and of course milkshakes.

programme.title: E20 - Mystery Seeds
programme.desc: When Duggee finds some seeds it's time for some gardening!

programme.title: E21 - Splash Dash
programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.title: E22 - Ping Pong Penguins
programme.desc: What's that bouncy, pingy, whacking sound? It's the Penguins playing ping-pong!

programme.title: E38 - Copycat
programme.desc: Bluey's having fun copying everything Dad says and does, but the game takes a serious turn when Bluey finds a hurt budgie and they have to make an emergency trip to the vet.

programme.title: E39 - The Sleepover
programme.desc: A sleepover with their cousin means Bluey and Bingo get to stay up late! But when Muffin shows up exhausted after missing her nap, the girls get more fun than they bargained for.

programme.title: E40 - Early Baby
programme.desc: Bluey's playgroup is at odds when Indy's baby hospital collides with Rusty's knights and dragons. But in explaining themselves, they both find that their games actually have a lot in common.

programme.title: E4 - The Talent Badge
programme.desc: Out for a walk, the Squirrels spot an interesting poster - it's King Tiger advertising his Roar Talent Show. Naturally, the Squirrels are very keen to take part.

programme.title: E19 - Mysterious Milkshake
programme.desc: More fun with Duggee, biscuits, eggs, toys and of course milkshakes.

programme.title: E20 - Mystery Seeds

programme.desc: Duggie chooses a key and his blue digger to dig up a big bone. The chipmunk makes a delivery to the squirrels.

programme.desc: What's that bouncy, pingy, whacking sound? It's the Penguins playing ping-pong!

programme.title: E23 - Stick Together
programme.desc: Have you seen Duggee? Help the Squirrels search for him, but they need to stick together!

programme.title: E110 - Rain
programme.desc: A cloud appears in Teletubbyland and it rains. Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po watch the flowers bloom. Another cloud appears and it rains pink, Tubby Custard!

programme.title: E3 - Surprise! - Bluey Special Trilogy Episode 3
programme.desc: Bluey special trilogy episode 3 - Bluey and Bingo want dad to play two different games, so dad tries to play both at the same time. While also watching the race on TV.

programme.title: E40 - Relax
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

programme.title: How Africa Sets Its Own Creative Standards
programme.desc: Today, host Bibi Raii meets with Juliet Olanipekun, Princess of Arigigi Akoko to talk about the luxury of Nigerian designs and to try them on - as this episode is all about: African Taste, on African terms.

programme.title: From Competition To Combat: Athletes In The Baltic States Prepare For Defen
programme.desc: In the Baltic states, athletes are preparing for more than just competition. As Russia's war in Ukraine reshapes Europe's security landscape, athletes in Latvia, Lithuania and Estonia balance elite training with military service. From conscription to volunteer defense leagues, their skills are increasingly tied to national defense, blurring the line between being an athlete and a soldier.

programme.title: The Best Things You Can Do For Back Pain
programme.desc: A bad back often has no clear physical cause - but what often helps is movement. In Good Shape looks at what actually matters in back training and which workouts make a real difference.

programme.title: The Chefs
programme.desc: What is their recipe for success? What challenges do they face? How do women in Asian society assert themselves in an industry still dominated by men? What is currently in vogue in the culinary world? In what way do cultural, social and ethical considerations also play a role?

programme.desc: Venice is a city unlike any other, so it's no surprise its cemetery is also unique. Located halfway between the city of Venice and the glassblowing island of Murano, Venetians find their final resting place on the cemetery island of San Michele.

programme.title: Travelogue
programme.desc: Travelogue is a 30-minute travel program. Through the journeys of our intrepid hosts, we experience the beauty, culture and mystery of China, discovering how people live in this vast country and showcasing China's transformation to the world.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won't find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today's world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won't find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today's world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already ''living in the future'!

programme.desc: Young mother Kelli discovers that husband Ty is secretly married to another woman. Kelli threatens to file charges, but when Ty dies suddenly she suspects he's faked his death and is planning to kill her.

programme.title: My Husband's Other Wife
programme.desc: Young mother Kelli discovers that husband Ty is secretly married to another woman. Kelli threatens to file charges, but when Ty dies suddenly she suspects he's faked his death and is planning to kill her.

programme.title: E3 - Turk-Ish Leek Burgers & Peach Crumb Bars
programme.desc: Jake is inspired by two dishes he learned from his mother-in-law and grandmother. The first is a Turkish leek burger. For dessert, it's a variation of his grandmother's cake with peach crumb bars.

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: Josh Niland, the fish king, surprises all the contestants when he unveils perfectly butchered cuts of beef. He then leads the kitchen in a masterclass on how to butcher a tuna to represent beef cuts.

programme.title: E13 - Sandra Benhamou/Pelagia Kolotouros/Marie-Cecile Kfouri
programme.desc: In the heart of Brittany, visit the Pont-Aven museum. Interior design and a passion for cinema come together in Sandra Benhamou's world. Lacoste reinvents itself under the leadership of Pelagia Kolotouros. Patient and meticulous, restorer Marie-Cecile Kfouri brings frescoes and old canvases back to life.

programme.title: E9 - Draw A Japanese Macaque
programme.desc: Koumi is 6 years old, mischievous and always full of fun. The dream of her life is to know all the animals of the world, and she absolutely loves drawing! In each episode she explains how to draw animals really well.

programme.title: E44 - Red-Crowned Crane
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: Le Grand Jt Des Territoires:2026
programme.desc: Up-to-date news from the French regions presented by Cyril Viguier.

programme.title: E7 - Conquering The Depths
programme.desc: Heading to the Canary Islands in Spain. Onboard the submarine ''Le Trieste'', Diego Bunuel descends over 3,000 meters to explore the deep sea, a fascinating world inhabited by strange bioluminescent creatures.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil S8
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: E4 - Blocks, Dancing, Football & Storytime!
programme.desc: It's a day of learning to play together with blocks, dancing, football & storytime! First, Jeff's neat block towers keep getting knocked over by Bubbles, & they must learn to share their space. Then, Fuse refuses to listen to instructions during a dancing game & has to learn how to work as a team. The lessons continue as Bubbles learns not to cheat to win a football game & Jeff has to decide if he will share his new book during storytime.

programme.title: E1 - Orphle & Winston's Worst Ideas Ever!
programme.desc: Get ready for chaos with Orphle & Winston's worst ideas ever! First, Doubler accidentally multiplies monster truck Orphle, & all the new Orphles team up to cause trouble in Pet Port! Then, Winston wants to be turned into a big cat, but a Magic Pet accidentally turns him into a big rat instead, forcing Mila & Morphle to find him. The bad ideas continue as the two villains try to cheat to win a game of Capture the Flag!

programme.title: E1 - Epic Rescues & Weasel's Fails!
programme.desc: Get ready for epic rescues & Mr. Weasel's hilarious fails! The chaos begins when Weasel fills Max the Monster Truck's tires with helium, causing him to float away & forcing Gecko to perform a sky-high rescue! Then, Weasel's plan to give Molly extra bouncy springs goes wrong, & Gecko has to help her stop bouncing. The rescues continue when Weasel's new electro-magnet sucks up Baby Truck & the Mechanicals, & Gecko has to save the day!

programme.title: E3 - A Big Ocean Clean Up Day!
programme.desc: Join the Shark Family as they work hard to keep the sea clean! It's a busy day with so much rubbish on the seabed. Stanley Shark becomes his heroic alter-ego, Super Shark, to show everyone how to clean up & recycle properly! The Sharksons show their creativity by using recycled materials to build an amazing underwater ball pit & slide. Plus, see them use teamwork to operate little digger trucks & even fix a broken bus wheel using a sunken bin lid!

programme.title: E2 - Baby John's Fun Day at School!
programme.desc: Join Baby John for a fun day at school! First, he learns that karate can be challenging, but with a lot of practice, he learns how to kick, punch & move! Then, he learns how to play soccer with the help of his big brother & sister. The day continues with a special surprise guest who drops in & teaches the gang how to play different instruments, like the piano, trumpet & guitar! It's always a fun day of learning at school!

programme.title: E4 - Blocks, Dancing, Football & Storytime!
programme.desc: It's a day of learning to play together with blocks, dancing, football & storytime! First, Jeff's neat block towers keep getting knocked over by Bubbles, & they must learn to share their space. Then, Fuse refuses to listen to instructions during a dancing game & has to learn how to work as a team. The lessons continue as Bubbles learns not to cheat to win a football game & Jeff has to decide if he will share his new book during storytime.

programme.title: E1 - Gecko's Genius Outdoor Fixes!
programme.desc: Gecko is using his genius for some amazing outdoor fixes! On a rainy camping trip, Green Mechanical runs out of battery, so Gecko & Grandma create a water wheel from scratch to recharge her with green energy! Then, when Mr. Weasel's advertising blimp starts to fly away with him attached, Gecko must use a bouncy castle to prepare a soft landing! From finding lost keys in a sandcastle to stopping Max from getting stuck in the mud, Gecko can fix it all!

programme.title: E2 - JJ Learns to Take Care of Himself!
programme.desc: JJ is learning all about how to take care of himself! Join the family as they learn the right way to brush their teeth. When JJ gets nervous about his first trip to the dentist, TomTom & YoYo are there to show him it's not so scary! The self-care continues as the kids learn about fire drill safety with Nina & help Mom & Dad with spring cleaning by becoming 'Clean Machines'! It's a day of learning healthy habits & routines!

programme.title: E1 - Orphle & Winston's Worst Ideas Ever!

programme.title: E223 - Buttercup / We Need To Save The Corals
programme.desc: Barbidou's beautiful roses mysteriously disappeared during the night. // Barbapapa decides to tell the barbababies about the time he went to explore the Arctic and the seabed.

programme.desc: Barbapapa tells the Barbababies about his extraordinary encounter with a wolf. // Tomorrow is the Barbababies' first day of school.

programme.title: E305 - The Crew Builds A Giant Skate Track / The Crew Builds A Giant Ice Cream Mak
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew help River take lots of pictures for the big photo contest by building a super-fast way to get around Bulider Cove. // Rubble and the pups help Cafe Carl make enough ice cream for everyone! If Speed Meister doesn't get in the way...

programme.title: E831 - Mr Potato's Fruit & Vegetable Quiz
programme.desc: Peppa and friends are at school where they have a special guest, Mr Potato! Mr Potato is there to host a special quiz for the children about fruit and vegetables.

programme.title: E104 - Tooth On The Loose / Scaredy Croc
programme.desc: When Mr. Crocodile loses a tooth, Daisy wants to make sure he gets a visit from the tooth fairy. // Mr. Crocodile, Daisy and their friends are scared to fetch Martin's gloves from his spooky shed.

programme.title: E103 - The Puzzle Of The Plummeting Eggs
programme.desc: In a world of anthropomorphic animals, Sam Snow and Kit Casey are elite agents of C.L.A.D.E. (Covert League of Animal Detective Experts) who travel the world solving mysteries with their expertise in problem-solving and animal facts.

programme.title: E145 - Daddy Puts Up A Picture
programme.desc: Daddy Pig offers to put up a picture of Peppa and George on the wall while Mummy Pig is out. He accidentally cracks the wall while doing it, so Peppa and George help Daddy Pig fix the wall before Mummy Pig comes home.

programme.title: E147 - Mister Skinnylegs
programme.desc: George finds a spider in the bathroom sink, but Peppa is really frightened-until she realizes that it doesn't want to hurt her.

programme.title: The Observers
programme.desc: The Observers on France 24 is a weekly show produced with photos, videos and personal accounts from Observers around the world. Top international current affairs are covered by using eyewitness accounts from Observers- people who are at the heart of an event. They send their photos and videos, which are verified and contextualized by France 24 team of professional journalists in Paris. The Observers are volunteers, and are not paid for their contributions.

programme.desc: Vidhi, a young woman, falls in love with Devratha, a middle-aged tycoon. Together they embark on a journey of love, and acceptance beyond the barrier of age.

programme.title: Shaurya Aur Anokhi Ki Kahani
programme.desc: Shaurya, a male chauvinist who believes that every girl's future belongs in the kitchen, is in for a surprise when he crosses paths with Anokhi, a hardworking girl.

programme.desc: Saraswati Chandra calls off his marriage with Kumud, eventually leading to her being married off to a drunkard. Years later, Kumud, now a widow, comes face-to-face with Saraswati.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 故事以夏日的相遇為主題，在海邊一起出生及長大的「海邊的灰姑娘」女子三人組與在東京就讀一流大學的優等生男子們相識的故事。在盛夏的海邊出現命運般的相遇，各人一起努力跨越看不見的差異，帶著複雜交錯的感情，相互交織想法一起成長。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 大學時期的男主角月岡夏，與同學南雲水季交往起來，並過著幸福的日子。然而，正當他們都在忙著就業活動的時候，水季卻突然向他提出分手，從此兩人分道揚鑣。就這樣過了七年，已經開展新生活的夏，卻突然收到大學時代朋友的通知，原來水季已經離開了人世。從分手那天起就沒有再見過水季的夏，帶著難以置信的心情去參加了水季的葬禮。在葬禮上，夏見到了一個名叫海的小女孩，並得知她是水季和他的女兒，讓他感到十分震驚。原來當年水季竟瞞著他生下了他們的孩子，並且一直默默地撫養著這個孩子。知道這一切以後，夏開始思考水季和海在這七年間的生活。

programme.title: E3

programme.desc: In Bel Ombre, Samuel meets a couple seeking a property on the wild side of the island. In Azuri, Viviane meets a client hoping to retire on Mauritius. Rinie and Manon are on the hunt for a family villa.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Rick braves the notoriously wild Atlantic waters to learn about the ancient fishing method of handlining at Sennen Cove off Land's End. programme.title: Recipe For Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: Young Lady And Gentleman
programme.desc: To Dan-dan, her family was an obstacle. She eventually leaves home and starts working as a resident tutor. And the more time she spends with the kids and their father, Young-guk, the more she falls for him.

programme.title: E13 - Food
programme.desc: In this food-filled episode, Catfish throws up all over the world. The biking duo try various forms of genitalia including bull testicle, tiger and sea penis, virgin eggs, otherwise known as pee billed eggs, and more. They try duck head in China and worm tequila and mosquito eggs in Mexico. The question becomes, can you keep it down while watching this special episode?

programme.title: E24
programme.desc: After a year of imprisonment under Murashige, Kanbei has reached his physical and mental limits. The standoff between Murashige, who continues to hold out, and the Oda forces has dragged on, but Koichiro succeeds in cutting off the supply lines. Persuaded by his wife Dashi (Yamaya Kasumi), Murashige finally decides to surrender. Tasked with informing Nobunaga, Koichiro asks Dashi to deliver a message to Kanbei. Just when it seems the conflict will end without further bloodshed, events take a devastating turn, and everything changes.

programme.title: Légendes urbaines
programme.desc: Un moment dédié pour donner la parole aux grands acteurs des cultures urbaines mondiales. Ils sont les têtes d'affiches des genres musicaux les plus écoutés aujourd'hui mais sont parfois méconnus du grand public. Une découverte de la face cachée' de ces artistes, derrière les clichés, les postures, et loin de l'actualité promotionnelle.'

programme.title: E7 - Montie & Sherry (Part A)
programme.desc: Montie and Sherry find themselves in a dire situation as their daughter, Audora, is contemplating involving adult protection services due to their living conditions.

programme.title: E3 - Emilia Carr
programme.desc: In 2009, Emilia Carr and her boyfriend Joshua Fulgham were convicted for the first-degree murder and kidnapping of Heather Strong, and Emilia alone was sentenced to death.

programme.title: E7 - Montie & Sherry (Part A)
programme.desc: Montie and Sherry find themselves in a dire situation as their daughter, Audora, is contemplating involving adult protection services due to their living conditions.

programme.title: E3 - Emilia Carr
programme.desc: In 2009, Emilia Carr and her boyfriend Joshua Fulgham were convicted for the first-degree murder and kidnapping of Heather Strong, and Emilia alone was sentenced to death.

programme.title: E1 - Surviving Abduction
programme.desc: Five women share their harrowing accounts of abduction and imprisonment. They discuss what happens when the news coverage dies down and how they've healed from the trauma they experienced.

programme.title: E4 - The Death Of Lavender Doe
programme.desc: When a mystery woman's burning body is found in an oil field in 2006, the rural community of Kilgore and a determined Texas lawman show why you don't mess with the Lone Star State.

programme.title: E4 - Soldier Down At Fort Meade
programme.desc: For nearly a year, investigators from multiple law enforcement agencies work tirelessly to uncover a twisted tale of secrets and lies that led to murder.

programme.title: E4 - The Tip Off
programme.desc: The Malaysian Maritime Enforcement Agency is tasked to intercept two ships with illegal immigrants on board. Meanwhile the Forensics unit investigates a shooting incident in the neighbourhood of Bangsar.

programme.title: E3 - Refusal To Comply
programme.desc: Summer around the Lake of the Ozarks heats up as Corporal Stephen Riner tries to stop a curious case of road rage. K9 officer Corporal Caleb Harvey and Donzi search a vehicle they believe has narcotics.

programme.title: E12 - Hollie Gazzard
programme.desc: When a young woman tries to end a controlling relationship, her former boyfriend carries out a brazen, public attack—forcing a community to confront the deadly consequences of jealousy and obsession.

programme.title: E6 - Richard Ramirez: The Nightstalker
programme.desc: Richard Ramirez terrorised Southern California in the mid-1980s, and anyone could be a target. Growing up yearning for a father figure, he found mentorship with his sadistic cousin.

programme.title: E4 - Linda Carty
programme.desc: Linda Carty was sentenced to death on February 19, 2001 for the kidnapping of three-day-old newborn Ray Cabrera, and the kidnapping and murder of his mother, Joana Rodriguez.

programme.desc: Summer around the Lake of the Ozarks heats up as Corporal Stephen Riner tries to stop a curious case of road rage. K9 officer Corporal Caleb Harvey and Donzi search a vehicle they believe has narcotics.

programme.desc: For nearly a year, investigators from multiple law enforcement agencies work tirelessly to uncover a twisted tale of secrets and lies that led to murder.

programme.title: E4 - The Tip Off
programme.desc: The Malaysian Maritime Enforcement Agency is tasked to intercept two ships with illegal immigrants on board. Meanwhile the Forensics unit investigates a shooting incident in the neighbourhood of Bangsar.

programme.title: E4 - Linda Carty
programme.desc: Linda Carty was sentenced to death on February 19, 2001 for the kidnapping of three-day-old newborn Ray Cabrera, and the kidnapping and murder of his mother, Joana Rodriguez.

programme.title: E1 - Surviving Abduction
programme.desc: Five women share their harrowing accounts of abduction and imprisonment. They discuss what happens when the news coverage dies down and how they've healed from the trauma they experienced.

programme.title: E4 - The Death Of Lavender Doe
programme.desc: When a mystery woman's burning body is found in an oil field in 2006, the rural community of Kilgore and a determined Texas lawman show why you don't mess with the Lone Star State.

programme.title: E3 - Refusal To Comply
programme.desc: Summer around the Lake of the Ozarks heats up as Corporal Stephen Riner tries to stop a curious case of road rage. K9 officer Corporal Caleb Harvey and Donzi search a vehicle they believe has narcotics.

programme.title: E12 - Hollie Gazzard
programme.desc: When a young woman tries to end a controlling relationship, her former boyfriend carries out a brazen, public attack—forcing a community to confront the deadly consequences of jealousy and obsession.

programme.title: E6 - Richard Ramirez: The Nightstalker
programme.desc: Richard Ramirez terrorised Southern California in the mid-1980s, and anyone could be a target. Growing up yearning for a father figure, he found mentorship with his sadistic cousin.

programme.title: E4 - Soldier Down At Fort Meade
programme.desc: For nearly a year, investigators from multiple law enforcement agencies work tirelessly to uncover a twisted tale of secrets and lies that led to murder.

programme.title: E4 - The Tip Off
programme.desc: The Malaysian Maritime Enforcement Agency is tasked to intercept two ships with illegal immigrants on board. Meanwhile the Forensics unit investigates a shooting incident in the neighbourhood of Bangsar.

programme.title: Tubig To Handle
programme.desc: Get ready to get soaked! 💦 Experience the wettest, wildest, and wackiest game show in the Philippines - Tubig To Handle!. Watch as fearless contestants dive headfirst into epic water obstacle challenges, face hilarious wipeouts, and battle it out for BIG prizes. From slippery slides to heart-pumping showdowns, every episode is packed with non-stop action, laughter, and pure Pinoy fun. Hosted by Yassi Pressman and your favorite stars, this splash-filled adventure is guaranteed to bring nonstop laughter, thrills, and all-out water fun like never before!

programme.title: Are You G? With Mj Felipe S2
programme.desc: Are You G is an experiential talk show hosted by MJ, a seasoned entertainment journalist known for his heartfelt storytelling and authentic connections. The show dives deep into the personal journeys of celebrities and Global Pinoys, uncovering real-life challenges, candid moments, and shared experiences. With a vibrant and youthful tone, Are You G blends meaningful conversations with graceful advice, offering viewers a refreshing perspective on life, identity, and resilience.

programme.title: E22 - 夢會實現 愛會到來
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 重磅打造的全明星爆笑旅行遊戲真人秀，由黃曉明、黃子韜、劉耀文、邵子恆、王鶴棣、于洋組成「宇宙爆閃團」，用高能抽象任務，打造解壓式快樂體驗，去有趣的地方做有意義的事；放下偶像包袱，發送獨一無二的快樂訊號。

E4
programme.desc: 《誰是兇手》講述了一起發生在海舟市的連環兇案，在真相塵封了十七年之後，與這宗懸案有著千絲萬縷聯繫的人們，在各自不可告人的秘密中，一起等待真相浮出水面的故事。 2001年寒冬，海舟市印刷廠家屬院發生了一起命案。新人刑警冷小兵和師兄接到一起報案奔赴現場，卻意外面對海舟市連環殺人案的兇手。冷小兵膽怯不敢開槍，兇手從現場逃走並殺害了師兄李嵐。現場另一名目擊證人是躲在床下的夏木。為繼續留在警隊冷小兵隱瞞了不敢開槍的事，夏木也沒有揭穿他。至此兇手藏匿起來，海舟案懸而未決。十七年後，夏木來到警隊實習，以冷小兵不敢開槍的事作為把柄，要挾他和自己一起查案。而伴随着神秘的心理医生沈雨的出现，一起几乎与十七年前一模一样的案子再次发生，而沈雨身上一个又一个疑团频频出现，凶手究竟是谁？

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 盛唐初年，氣象萬千；夜魅長安，業孽浮屠。光怪陸離之下盡是怪異之事，血雨腥風間暗藏獵殺危局。盛世奇譚，詭案揭幕。

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 盛唐初年，氣象萬千；夜魅長安，業孽浮屠。光怪陸離之下盡是怪異之事，血雨腥風間暗藏獵殺危局。盛世奇譚，詭案揭幕。

programme.title: A Man Called Hero
programme.desc: Hero goes home with excited but he finds his parent was killed. Gian took a group of foreigners to Hero's parents and forced them to hand over the Red Sword, their family treasure...

programme.title: And I Hate You So
programme.desc: Zhang hosts a top radio program that offers advice regarding love affairs. He starts a love-war relationship with Wu, a columnist, when she hears him gossiping on her love life!

programme.title: Hocus Pocus
programme.desc: In a touring opera group, the domineering star is hated by all. The lesser actors try to give him a bad time by posing as ghosts. Their antics attract the attention of a real ghost who comes to make fun of them. Stage old hand Seng soon discovers the mischievous ghost met a violent death. Seng promises to find his remains and bury him. Unwittingly, Seng buries the wrong bones which belong to the Vicious Ghost. The Vicious Ghost comes and leaves a trail of violence...

programme.title: A Chinese Odyssey (Part I - Pandora's Box)
programme.desc: At the foothills of Fingers Mountain, there is one Highwaymen's Haven, operating as a motel. The gang leader is a fellow named The Joker, and the gang makes a living out of robbing the traveling businessmen and scholars. The Joker is in fact Monkey King reincarnated. Grandpa Buddha is the only God who knows about this. Two of the devils, Spider Woman and Boney M, took the guise of Sharon Stone and Madonna and wooed him into betraying this secret. The two devils decided to get the Joker out of the way so that they could capture the Longevity Monk when the time came for his reincarnation...

programme.title: Heart Against Hearts
programme.desc: Advertising professional Alex and Chu Lai Ngo, played by George Lam and Do Do Cheng, finally get married and live with Chu's daughter Vivian, played by Vivian Chow. Since the owner of the advertising company migrates, Alex starts to take control of the company. However, the company is forced to close down due to the banker goes bankrupt. Besides, Chu and Vivian both join a financial investment company owned by Alex's old classmate ET, acted by Paul Chun. Chu is promoted to be the Assistant of General Manager in a short period of time. Nevertheless, it is a fraud for Chu. Can Alex save his company from closing down and how does Alex help Chu run away from the fraud...

programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Sandra Ng
programme.desc: Known as the 'Queen of Comedy', Sandra Ng as an actress has spanned across generations, allowing her to witness the ups and downs of Hong Kong films over decades. Looking back onto the golden age of Hong Kong cinema, Ng confessed that comedies in the old days were much more simple and straight forward. Stepping into the millennium, recession in film industry somehow inspired her to produce own masterpieces of the era. With her youth dedicated to the Hong Kong cinema, how does she feel about lifelong career as an actress, a director and a producer?
